name: Cream of Cauliflower Soup (and Cauliflower Cheese Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 head cauliflower, steamed until barely tender, then cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a stockpot over medium-high heat. Add the leek, onion, and carrot, and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes. Stir in the tarragon and thyme, then cook for an additional minute.
2. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute. Reduce the heat to medium and gradually stir in the white wine and chicken stock. Season with salt and black pepper, then add the cauliflower florets. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
3. Puree the soup in batches using an immersion blender. Return to the pot and stir in the milk and cream. Gently heat until warmed through. Serve hot.
Makes 2 1/2 quarts.
Variation: Cauliflower Cheese
Stir cheese into the soup after adding the milk and cream, then gently heat until melted.
